name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in @annondeveloper/ui-kit
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Import component '...'
2. Render with props '...'
3. Interact by '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **ui-kit version**: (e.g., 2.5.0)
- **React version**: (e.g., 19.0.0)
- **Browser**: (e.g., Chrome 124)
- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 15)
- **Bundler**: (e.g., Vite 6, Webpack 5)

## Component & Tier

- **Component**: (e.g., Button, MetricCard)
- **Weight Tier**: Lite / Standard / Premium

## Reproduction

Link to a minimal reproduction (CodeSandbox, StackBlitz, or GitHub repo).

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information (console errors, network logs, etc.).
